case_title: SOBHY ABDEL MOHSEN VS. CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, L.P. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MOHSEN, SOBHY ABDEL AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, L.P. SILMI, MAHERAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHSEN, SOBHY ABDEL AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-14-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-20-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SILMI, MAHERAH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, L.P. SILMI, MAHERAH
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES MADE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED AS TO MAHERAH SILMI BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-21-2008 AT 10:00AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHSEN, SOBHY ABDEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, L.P. $913.40 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,058.40, DEFENDANT MAHERAH SILMI DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR IT'S PREVIOUS PAYMENT OF $332.30 IF THE PAYMENT WAS RECEIVED AND ACCEPTED BY THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, L.P.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
